evals.prompt: We got hit by error 1205 every 20 minutes in production today. I extracted the deadlock XML from system_health XE. What is the root cause and pattern?
evals.expected_output: Deadlock Summary table with victim/winner, isolation levels, lock resources. Pattern Match identifying which of P1-P17 patterns this is. Root cause section. Fix priority table ranked Low/Medium/High effort vs effectiveness.

evals.prompt: I have 5 deadlock graphs from the last 24 hours. Are they the same root cause or different patterns?
evals.expected_output: Per-deadlock summaries plus cross-deadlock analysis noting whether they share common root cause (same tables, same lock order issue, same missing index).
